phase: Phase E - Release Closeout, Evidence Ledger, And Growth Handoff
decision: Phase E can begin with E-1, but Phase E cannot close and Mitra cannot be classified growth-ready until source parity, provider evidence, production HTTP behavior, live crawl/browser QA, drift baseline, platform readback, owner approvals, and remaining accessibility warnings are resolved or formally excepted.

evidence_modes.required_in_phase_e: E-1 and E-2 must reconcile local, GitHub, Figma Make, Supabase, hosting, functions, scripts, public assets, and generated reports without mixing scopes.
evidence_modes.current_basis: Local source and prior phase reports exist; final parity ledger is not yet complete.

evidence_modes.required_in_phase_e: E-1/E-3 must record final Figma Make preview/build and any local build used as evidence.
evidence_modes.current_basis: Prior local builds passed, but final release build/preview parity is not recorded.

evidence_modes.required_in_phase_e: E-3 must run bounded production HTTP/live checks and resolve or record blockers.
evidence_modes.current_basis: D-3 found production robots/sitemap/product-sitemap/Merchant-feed static asset mismatch.

evidence_modes.required_in_phase_e: E-3 must smoke-test production desktop/mobile journeys after source parity and provider evidence are reconciled.
evidence_modes.current_basis: Prior D-4 local browser smoke passed with warnings; production browser smoke is missing.

evidence_modes.required_in_phase_e: E-2/E-3/E-4 must record Search Console, GBP, Merchant Center, analytics, CrUX/PageSpeed, server-log, and provider readback envelopes where access exists.
evidence_modes.current_basis: D-3 marked authenticated platform access unavailable.

evidence_modes.required_in_phase_e: E-5 must reconcile owner/media/platform exceptions from Phase C before final readiness classification.
evidence_modes.current_basis: Phase C is locally complete with owner/platform exceptions.

evidence_modes.required_in_phase_e: E-3/E-5 must verify checkout accessibility warnings and any provider-safe booking/checkout evidence before readiness classification.
evidence_modes.current_basis: D-4 found duplicate checkout submit controls, field-error recovery warnings, and placeholder social links.

evidence_modes.required_in_phase_e: E-3/E-4 must validate old product identifier redirects, sitemap/canonical behavior, not-found states, and drift baseline.
evidence_modes.current_basis: Phase B implemented slug/redirect/source logic locally; production redirect verification remains open.

evidence_modes.required_in_phase_e: E-4 must define incident triggers and response owner; no time-series incident evidence is currently available.
evidence_modes.current_basis: No live incident or traffic-drop dataset has been supplied.

phase_e_layers.purpose: Separate executed, supplied, failed, unavailable, and owner-approved exception evidence before final classification.
phase_e_layers.must_not_do: Do not turn local source, supplied reports, or missing platform access into a production pass.

phase_e_layers.purpose: Record local/GitHub/Figma Make file parity and stale source risks.
Record Supabase, hosting, functions, redirects, static assets, provider states, and secret status without exposing secrets.
Verify production crawl, HTTP, redirects, robots, sitemaps, feeds, browser journeys, checkout, and direct-route behavior.
Create representative URL baseline, drift comparison rules, monitoring cadence, incident triggers, and owner handoff.
Reconcile all phase wrap-ups, exceptions, live/platform evidence, unresolved risk, and final status.

critical_preimplementation_rules: E-1 must list only Figma Make source files that actually need manual Figma patching.
E-2 must use the project wrapper and project-specific Supabase guardrails before provider/backend readback or changes.
E-2 must record secrets only as set/missing and never write secrets to repo artifacts.
E-3 must treat production robots/sitemap/feed asset mismatch as a blocker until live fetch proves expected text/XML behavior.
E-3 must not run destructive checkout or booking actions; provider-safe smoke only.
E-4 must version only sanitized drift baselines and avoid raw customer/authenticated data.
E-5 must classify readiness as growth-ready, pilot-ready with limitations, blocked, or complete locally only; it must not use a generic SEO score as a ranking prediction.
known_blockers_entering_phase_e: Figma Make final preview parity not verified.
Product sitemap deployed fetch verification missing.
Merchant feed submission and deployed checkout validation not verified.
P1 service proof/content owner proof missing.
Authenticated platform readback and live reconciliation missing.
